detail: Automatically scraped from SoundImports (scraped via soundimports.eu). T/S parameters have not been verified by a human against the datasheet.
corrections: Pe corrected 1.0W->500W (parse_number comma bug: "1,000 watts"->1.0); Sd corrected 0.0001241->0.12411 m2 ("1,241.1 cm2" parsed as 1.241); both confirmed against Dayton Audio PA460-8 datasheet (user-provided)
